title: Grunwerg Tablespoons, Stainless Steel, Set of 12
features: AFFORDABLE CUTLERY FOR ANY OCCASION: The Economy Cutlery Collection by Grunwerg offers an affordable, practical choice for your kitchen.
HUGE RANGE AVAILABLE: From standard teaspoons, tablespoons, knives and forks to pastry forks and child-sized cutlery, the Economy Collection has your needs covered.
MIRROR POLISHED STAINLESS STEEL: The shiny finish on these durable 18/0 stainless steel Children’s Table Forks suits any kitchen setting, from your home to a bustling restaurant!
HASSLE FREE CLEANING: The entire Economy Collection is dishwasher safe.
BUMPER SIZE PACKS: Economy Children’s Table Forks are sold in packs of 12.
description: From the manufacturer Economy Collection, budget cutlery Our Economy Collection cutlery is designed with low cost in mind and is ideal for everyday use. Quality cutlery from a brand you can trust Founded in 1945, the award-winning Grunwerg family business produces high-quality household goods and catering products, specializing in high-quality steel. The company is headed by the Grunwerg family, which is located in the steel city of Sheffield. The guaranteed high-quality Grunwerg product range remains the first choice among professionals and renowned chefs in the food industry. Designed with affordability in mind Grunwerg, a family-run company has called upon their many years of catering expertise to produce a low-cost, effective range of cutlery which can withstand heavy use - either in professional kitchen environments or in your own home! The entire range is made from 18/0 stainless steel with a shiny mirror-polished finish and comes in boxes of 12, giving you great value for money. Although hand washing is recommended, this cutlery can easily be cleaned in your dishwasher. Made from the finest quality 18/0 stainless steel making every part of the range rust resistant. You'll receive 12 pieces of your chosen cutlery. Check out the Grunwerg store for our full range of Economy cutlery along with all our kitchenware!
